heading: Definitions
label: 5541 Definitions

CodificationThis section was enacted as part of the American Super Computing Leadership Act of 2017 which comprises this subchapter, and not as part of the High-Performance Computing Act of 1991 which comprises this chapter.

children.heading: Department
children.label: 1 Department
children.text: The term “Department” means the Department of Energy.

children.heading: Exascale computing
children.label: 2 Exascale computing
children.text: The term “exascale computing” means computing through the use of a computing machine that performs near or above 10 to the 18th power operations per second.

children.heading: High-end computing system
children.label: 3 High-end computing system
children.text: The term “high-end computing system” means a computing system with performance that substantially exceeds that of systems that are commonly available for advanced scientific and engineering applications.

children.heading: Leadership System
children.label: 4 Leadership System
children.text: The term “Leadership System” means a high-end computing system that is among the most advanced in the world in terms of performance in solving scientific and engineering problems.

children.heading: Institution of higher education
children.label: 5 Institution of higher education
children.text: The term “institution of higher education” has the meaning given the term in .section 1001(a) of title 20

children.heading: Secretary
children.label: 6 Secretary
children.text: The term “Secretary” means the Secretary of Energy.
